88: bool json_pointer_success_test(const padded_string & source, const char *json_pointer, std::string_view expected_value) {
89:   std::cout << "Running successful JSON pointer test '" << json_pointer << "' ..." << std::endl;
90:   dom::parser parser;
91:   dom::element doc;
92:   auto error = parser.parse(source).get(doc);
93:   if(error) { std::cerr << "cannot parse: " << error << std::endl; return false; }
94:   dom::element answer;
95:   error = doc.at_pointer(json_pointer).get(answer);
96:   if(error) { std::cerr << "cannot access pointer: " << error << std::endl; return false; }
97:   std::string str_answer = simdjson::minify(answer);
98:   if(str_answer != expected_value) {
99:     std::cerr << "They differ!!!" << std::endl;
100:     std::cerr << "   found    '" << str_answer << "'" << std::endl;
101:     std::cerr << "   expected '" << expected_value << "'" << std::endl;
102:   }
103:   ASSERT_EQUAL(str_answer, expected_value);
